comments.comment: We'll begin refining this section by applying Prompt Surgeon v2.0 principles: clarify role boundaries, enforce structural consistency, and cut any ambiguity in hierarchy, activation logic, or persona functions.
Used as governance layer for all downstream revisions — will guide the persona rewrites, system structure updates, and any new module creation during this refinement + scaling process.
We'll check for redundancy, implicit logic, or missing escalation conditions here. If this is the brainstem of your system, it must fail-proof under any condition or phrasing.
This structure holds well, but we’ll validate it against Prompt Surgeon v2.0: does it define role, function, output, and constraints clearly enough to be cloned or taught?
